949 S Bank Rd, Oakville, WA 98568, USA

Tart little apples every year. Tart in a good way, fragrant. Fruits heavily. Great in baking and tbh not bad eaten straight. Right on the corner of the fence of the cemetery. Not sure if public or private but it is on a cemetery so please as always be respectf
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
